name: José Isaac Hernández Quintero
intro: I am a capable, decisive, and proactive Senior Software Engineer. I'm passionate about new technologies, enjoy discovering new concepts, and bringing innovation to daily work. I've founded my own company and worked within established teams, gaining both entrepreneurial and corporate experience.
